title: Multiple boards in one calendar
excerpt:
I have multiple boards - for example staff leave, and marketing campaigns. I already have a dashboard and calendar widget for each within their own boards. 
But is there a way to overlay the calendars so I can see who is…

posts.author: TaniaM (Tania Myles)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have multiple boards - for example staff leave, and marketing campaigns. I already have a dashboard and calendar widget for each within their own boards.
But is there a way to overlay the calendars so I can see who is on leave in line with what campaigns we have running?
I understand there’s connect boards - but I’m confused as the item names are not the same to create a mirror of information. In board one the item is the staff name, and in board two the item is the campaign name - completely different.
Thank you

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
With zzBots a 3rd party solution, you are able to 2-Way Sync your boards so any new or updated items will automatically sync to the other board. You can specify which fields are synced to which fields, so if you need then you can have the name populate as a different value.

Here is a link to get started: https://www.zzbots.com/store/mondaycom-mondaycom-2-way-sync

If you have any questions or need help, just chat with us on our website, we would be glad to assist you.

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @TaniaM , you can use the app Same Item Multiple Boards to bring all your items into one board and create a calendar widget from there

posts.author: TaniaM (Tania Myles)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your answer. I was able to figure out that there are two meanings for “dashboard”. I was thinking a “dashboard” within a board. But there’s also Dashboard instead of a board in the main workspace where you can create a merged calendar of boards

posts.author: WhitneyPT (Whitney Britton)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I ask how you merged the calendadr on the dashboard in the main workspace?

posts.author: TaniaM (Tania Myles)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, sure! From your home page click the blue + to add new and select New Dashboard - after giving it a name, the next screen will ask you which boards you want to connect to this new dashboard. From there you can create widgets and calendars etc which bring in the data from all connected boards. I put a screenshot here, I hope it works

posts.author: WhitneyPT (Whitney Britton)
posts.cookedHtml: That was so helpful!! Thank you

posts.author: TaniaM (Tania Myles)
posts.cookedHtml: You’re welcome!

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @TaniaM @WhitneyPT @Malachi, We’ve developed a new calendar app that enables you to transform items into dynamic calendar events. Additionally, you can use a dashboard widget to connect multiple boards. check it out: monday.com apps marketplace
